overallAssessment: The agent successfully decomposed the complex Non-Functional Requirement into distinct, logically separated commitments. The tier assignments (B, B, C) are consistent with the nature of the sub-commitments (Policy Thresholds and Measurement Verification). The agent correctly identified that the parent NFR represents a broad quality sub-area (Tier A), overriding the provided hint (Tier C) with a strong, justifiable rationale.
